settings.heading: Stories Worth Discovering
settings.subheading: Curated collections of books, stationery, and literary gifts for every kind of reader.
settings.label: Welcome to our bookshop
Try the voice clerk
settings.heading: How to use Bizmis
settings.intro: Tap the Bizmis button in the corner and just talk, the way you would with a clerk on the shop floor. Here are a few things to try.
settings.notice_text: This is a Bizmis demo store, so feel free to explore and chat as much as you like. It is a showcase, which means checkout, payments, shipping, emails, and phone numbers are not real. Nothing here charges a card or sends a message.
settings.merchant_text: Behind the scenes, Bizmis records session replays, auto-tags every chat, and surfaces funnel insights, so you always know where to improve. Add it to your store in a few clicks.

settings.title: Find the perfect pick
settings.example: I need a gift for someone who loves mystery novels.
settings.text: Bizmis asks a question or two and guides you to the right book, so more visitors feel confident enough to buy.

settings.title: Discover what pairs well
settings.example: What goes well with this journal?
settings.text: It suggests complementary add-ons and upgrades the way a great in-store associate would, lifting the order naturally.

settings.title: Ask anything about the store
settings.example: What is your return policy, and do you ship internationally?
settings.text: Instant, accurate answers on policies, products, and shipping, any time of day, with no waiting.

settings.title: Talk like you would in person
settings.example: I am a bit overwhelmed by all the choices, can you help?
settings.text: Bizmis reads the moment and responds with warm, genuine guidance that turns hesitation into a happy customer.

settings.label: Our Story
settings.heading: A Love Letter to Books
settings.text: We started as a tiny corner shop with a big dream: to create a space where every reader feels at home. Today, we bring that same warmth and curation to your doorstep — hand-picking every title, wrapping every order with care, and celebrating the joy of reading.
This bookshop has the most thoughtful selection I've ever seen. Every visit feels like a treasure hunt.
settings.author: Sarah M.

settings.text: The packaging is beautiful, and the handwritten recommendation notes are such a lovely touch.
settings.author: James K.

settings.text: Finally, an online bookshop that captures the feeling of browsing a real independent store.
settings.author: Emily R.

settings.label: Stay in the loop

settings.text: Get the latest recommendations, new arrivals, and exclusive offers delivered to your inbox.
